## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aembit and GrowthX to discuss content production progress, performance metrics, and strategy alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is progressing with 2 new articles published, 8 new topics proposed, and 1 article ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Traffic trends for GrowthX articles are consistent but modest (13-15 organic views per top article)](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Current content production pace and performance are below typical expectations for a 4-month engagement](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Team is exploring ways to improve topic selection, content quality, and production speed to drive better results](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [2 new articles published: "Workload Identity versus Workload Access Management" and "Dynamic Authorization versus Static Secrets"](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [8 new topics proposed, based on recent Aembit webinars](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [1 article ready for review: "How AI agents are creating a new class of identity risk"](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [4 articles moved back to editing based on Ashur's technical feedback](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)

### Traffic Performance Analysis

  - [Overall traffic trends consistent with previous months](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Top GrowthX article: "What Identity Federation means for workloads" (13 organic views)](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Performance varies month-to-month with different top articles](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Traffic levels modest: 8-13 organic views for top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Two consistent high-performers continue to drive most traffic](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)

### Content Strategy Discussion

  - [Dan emphasized need for articles that gain traction quickly, citing past successes](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Kyle cautioned against expecting immediate results, noting SEO typically compounds over weeks](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Team acknowledged need to balance quick wins with long-term SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Discussed leveraging successful content patterns and learning from metrics](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

### Benchmarking and Expectations

  - [Current performance below typical expectations for 4-month engagement](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Normal trajectory: 150-300 clicks/week by month 3, deeper data analysis by months 4-5](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Challenges: Technical nature of content, need for unique perspective not easily sourced publicly](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Exploring alternative content sources (e.g., webinars, team interviews) to capture Aembit's unique insights](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)

### Production Goals and Process

  - [Target: Publish more than 2 articles next week](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Dan raised concerns about slowdowns after initial feedback](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Kyle advocated for more proactive communication and pushing for higher output](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Discussed need for balance between volume and quality/uniqueness of content](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)

### SEO and Site Mechanics

  - [Ashur inquired about potential site-level SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [Ehtisham offered to conduct an SEO audit to identify any technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [Kyle noted that while an audit is valuable, it's likely not the primary blocker to performance](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ehtisham to improve communication on content progress and roadblocks](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore mixing webinar-based topics with pain point-focused content and social media insights](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Dan to handle topic review for newly proposed articles](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Ehtisham to revise articles with technical inaccuracies and resubmit by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct SEO audit of Aembit's website](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [Kyle and Dan to have follow-up discussion on campaign oversight and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/K2KwjwzYFNkakst3rCULptzuDVMuiXxA?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
